title: Tae Guk Gi: The Brotherhood of War
posterAlt: Tae Guk Gi: The Brotherhood of War (2004) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When two brothers are forced to fight in the Korean War, the elder decides to take the riskiest missions if it will help shield the younger from battle.
synopsis: Tae Guk Gi: The Brotherhood of War (2004) is a action, adventure and drama film from South Korea and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
